name: CloseButton
description: A circular close (✕) control — the floating dismiss for a focused widget or overlay: a surface-filled, bordered, shadowed icon button that reads on any background. Owns its full style; references tokens only.
whenToUse: The dismiss/close affordance on a focused component or modal, typically pinned to the top-right corner. Compose via a Ref; the host supplies the close action and the absolute placement.
